---
title: "RNA-Seq Thesis"
author: "Quinn Le"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Set-Up
```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(DESeq2)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(enrichplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(enrichplot)


setwd("/Users/quinnmle/Documents/Documents/Thesis Analysis")

```


## Input File Set-Up
```{r}
counts_file_path <- "counts.txt"
sample_info_file_path <- "sample_metadata.csv"
```


# Importing Count Matrix
```{r}
counts <- read.table(counts_file_path, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
rownames(counts) <- counts$Geneid 
counts <- counts[,-(1:6)]
counts <- as.matrix(counts)
```

## Importing Sample Information
```{r}
sample_info <- read.csv(sample_info_file_path, header = TRUE)
rownames(sample_info) <- sample_info$sample
sample_info$condition <- as.factor(sample_info$condition)

print("Comparison Groups:")
levels(sample_info$condition)
```

# Creating DESeq2 Object
```{r}
# Only works for this
colnames(counts) <- rownames(sample_info)


dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts,
  colData = sample_info,
  design = ~ condition
)

print("Number of genes before filtering:")
nrow(dds)

dds <- dds[rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10, ]

print("Number of genes after removing those with less than 10 counts:")
nrow(dds)

dds <- DESeq(dds)

all_genes_high <- as.data.frame(results(dds, contrast = c("condition", "mito_high", "control")))
all_genes_high$gene <- rownames(all_genes_high)

all_genes_low <- as.data.frame(results(dds, contrast = c("condition", "mito_low", "control")))
all_genes_low$gene <- rownames(all_genes_low)

all_genes_hl <- as.data.frame(results(dds, contrast = c("condition", "mito_high", "mito_low")))
all_genes_hl$gene <- rownames(all_genes_hl)


print("Number of genes with padj < 0.05")
nrow(subset(all_genes_high, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05))
nrow(subset(all_genes_low, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05))
nrow(subset(all_genes_hl, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05))

print("Number of genes with padj < 0.05 and log2FC > 2")
nrow(subset(all_genes_high, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 2))
nrow(subset(all_genes_low, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 2))
nrow(subset(all_genes_hl, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 2))

# Subsetting significant genes
sig_genes_high <- subset(all_genes_high, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 2 | log2FoldChange < -2)
sig_genes_low <- subset(all_genes_low, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 2 | log2FoldChange < -2)
sig_genes_hl <- subset(all_genes_hl, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05, log2FoldChange > 2 | log2FoldChange < -2)


```
"Number of genes before filtering:"
[1] 78894
[1] "Number of genes after removing those with less than 10 counts:"
[1] 24670
[1] "Number of genes with padj < 0.05"
[1] 8701
[1] 3313
[1] 9838
[1] "Number of genes with padj < 0.05 and log2FC > 2"
[1] 298
[1] 7
[1] 477








# PCA
```{r}

vsd <- vst(dds, blind = FALSE)
plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "condition")
ggsave("PCA.png")

```

# Volcano Plot Function
```{r}

make_volcano_pdf <- function(res_obj,
                             title_text,
                             outfile,
                             sig_cutoff = 0.01,
                             lfc_cutoff = 1,
                             top_n_up = 8,
                             top_n_down = 8,
                             label_padj_cutoff = 0.01,
                             label_lfc_cutoff = 1) {

  df <- as.data.frame(res_obj)
  df$ensembl_gene <- rownames(df)

  df <- df[!is.na(df$log2FoldChange) & !is.na(df$padj), ]
  df$neglog10_p <- -log10(df$pvalue)

  # Ensembl -> symbol
  df$ensembl_clean <- sub("\\..*$", "", df$ensembl_gene)
  df$symbol <- mapIds(
    org.Hs.eg.db,
    keys = df$ensembl_clean,
    column = "SYMBOL",
    keytype = "ENSEMBL",
    multiVals = "first"
  )
  df$plot_label <- ifelse(is.na(df$symbol) | df$symbol == "", df$ensembl_clean, df$symbol)

  # categories
  df$group <- "Not significant"
  df$group[!is.na(df$padj) & df$padj < sig_cutoff & df$log2FoldChange >= lfc_cutoff] <- "Upregulated"
  df$group[!is.na(df$padj) & df$padj < sig_cutoff & df$log2FoldChange <= -lfc_cutoff] <- "Downregulated"

  df$group <- factor(df$group, levels = c("Not significant", "Upregulated", "Downregulated"))

  # labels only from significant genes that also pass fold-change cutoff
  label_pool <- df[df$group %in% c("Upregulated", "Downregulated"), ]

  up_df <- label_pool[label_pool$group == "Upregulated", ]
  up_df <- up_df[order(up_df$padj, up_df$pvalue, -abs(up_df$log2FoldChange)), ]
  up_df <- head(up_df, top_n_up)

  down_df <- label_pool[label_pool$group == "Downregulated", ]
  down_df <- down_df[order(down_df$padj, down_df$pvalue, -abs(down_df$log2FoldChange)), ]
  down_df <- head(down_df, top_n_down)

  lab_df <- rbind(up_df, down_df)
  lab_df <- lab_df[!duplicated(lab_df$plot_label), ]

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = neglog10_p)) +
    geom_hline(
      yintercept = -log10(sig_cutoff),
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 0.4,
      color = "grey40"
    ) +
    geom_vline(
      xintercept = c(-lfc_cutoff, lfc_cutoff),
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 0.4,
      color = "grey40"
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = df[df$group == "Not significant", ],
      shape = 1,
      color = "black",
      size = 1.2,
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = df[df$group == "Upregulated", ],
      color = "#ff0000",
      size = 1.4,
      alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = df[df$group == "Downregulated", ],
      color = "#1f78b4",
      size = 1.4,
      alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = lab_df,
      aes(label = plot_label),
      size = 2.4,
      box.padding = 0.15,
      point.padding = 0.08,
      segment.size = 0.2,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      max.overlaps = Inf
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = "log2(fold change)",
      y = "-log10(padj)"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 11),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black")
    )

  ggsave(outfile)
}
```

Making volcano plots
```{r}
make_volcano_pdf(
  all_genes_low,
  "Differential Expression in Low Mitochondrial State versus Control",
  "volcano_mitoLow_vs_control.pdf",
  sig_cutoff = 0.05,
  lfc_cutoff = 2
)

make_volcano_pdf(
  all_genes_high,
  "Differential Expression in High Mitochondrial State versus Control",
  "volcano_mitoHigh_vs_control.pdf",
  sig_cutoff = 0.05,
  lfc_cutoff = 2
)

make_volcano_pdf(
  all_genes_hl,
  "Differential Expression in High versus Low Mitochondrial State",
  "volcano_mitoHigh_vs_mitoLow.pdf",
  sig_cutoff = 0.05,
  lfc_cutoff = 2
)
```


GO/KEGG Function
```{r}
run_go_kegg <- function(res_obj, prefix) {
  res_df <- as.data.frame(res_obj)
  res_df$gene <- rownames(res_df)

  # remove Ensembl version suffix if present
  res_df$gene <- sub("\\..*$", "", res_df$gene)

  # significant genes
  sig_up <- subset(res_df, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 2)
  sig_down <- subset(res_df, !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < -2)

  write.csv(sig_up, paste0(prefix, "_sig_up.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(sig_down, paste0(prefix, "_sig_down.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

  # ID conversion
  up_map <- bitr(sig_up$gene,
                 fromType = "ENSEMBL",
                 toType = c("ENTREZID", "SYMBOL"),
                 OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)

  down_map <- bitr(sig_down$gene,
                   fromType = "ENSEMBL",
                   toType = c("ENTREZID", "SYMBOL"),
                   OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)

  # GO
  ego_up <- enrichGO(
    gene = unique(up_map$ENTREZID),
    OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
    keyType = "ENTREZID",
    ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    readable = TRUE
  )

  ego_down <- enrichGO(
    gene = unique(down_map$ENTREZID),
    OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
    keyType = "ENTREZID",
    ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    qvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    readable = TRUE
  )

  # KEGG
  ekegg_up <- enrichKEGG(
    gene = unique(up_map$ENTREZID),
    organism = "hsa",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05
  )

  ekegg_down <- enrichKEGG(
    gene = unique(down_map$ENTREZID),
    organism = "hsa",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05
  )

  # save tables
  write.csv(as.data.frame(ego_up), paste0(prefix, "_GO_up.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(ego_down), paste0(prefix, "_GO_down.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(ekegg_up), paste0(prefix, "_KEGG_up.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(as.data.frame(ekegg_down), paste0(prefix, "_KEGG_down.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

```


Running GO/KEGG
```{r}
run_go_kegg(sig_genes_low, "mitoLow_vs_control")
run_go_kegg(sig_genes_high, "mitoHigh_vs_control")
run_go_kegg(sig_genes_hl, "mitoHigh_vs_mitoLow")

# save plots
plot_go_kegg <- function(res_obj, prefix) {
  ego_up <- read.csv(paste0(prefix, "_GO_up.csv"))
  ego_down <- read.csv(paste0(prefix, "_GO_down.csv"))
  kegg_up <- read.csv(paste0(prefix, "_KEGG_up.csv"))
  kegg_down <- read.csv(paste0(prefix, "_KEGG_down.csv"))
  
  pdf(paste0(prefix, "_GO_down_dotplot.pdf"))
  print(dotplot(ego_down, showCategory = 15))
  dev.off()
  
  pdf(paste0(prefix, "_KEGG_up_dotplot.pdf"))
  print(dotplot(ekegg_up, showCategory = 15))
  dev.off()

  pdf(paste0(prefix, "_KEGG_down_dotplot.pdf"))
  print(dotplot(ekegg_down, showCategory = 15))
  dev.off()

}

go_hi <- read.csv(paste0(prefix, "_GO_up.csv"))
go_hl <- read.csv(paste0(prefix, "_GO_down.csv"))
go_down <- read.csv(paste0(prefix, "_KEGG_up.csv"))

pdf(paste0(prefix, "_GO_down_dotplot.pdf"))
  print(dotplot(ego_down, showCategory = 15))
  dev.off()
  
  pdf(paste0(prefix, "_KEGG_up_dotplot.pdf"))
  print(dotplot(ekegg_up, showCategory = 15))
  dev.off()

  pdf(paste0(prefix, "_KEGG_down_dotplot.pdf"))
  print(dotplot(ekegg_down, showCategory = 15))
  dev.off()


plot_go_kegg(sig_genes_low, "mitoLow_vs_control")
plot_go_kegg(sig_genes_high, "mitoHigh_vs_control")
plot_go_kegg(sig_genes_hl, "mitoHigh_vs_mitoLow")
```
